div.div: Action, Adventure, Indie, Massively Multiplayer, RPG
Acquire a snowmobile in an Arctic Research Base
Watch another player through a CCTV camera
Win a regular game with an Information Era start
Discover at least 40,000 kilometers of roads
Reach the maximum amount of Court Grandeur
Have one hundred living dynasty members
Unlock 50 map tiles in a single city.
Experience all four seasons by building a city in a climate with a snowy winter.
